title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 05 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 05 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 05 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/06/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fall in a day，the main contract closed 825， an decrease of 1.84% throughout the day;some traders were negative to sell; Some Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 823-830 yuan/mt; decreased 5-10 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 850-855 yuan/mt; decreased 5 yuan/mt over yesterday.
